case_title: HADAR, LUA AKA ITZLER, LOUISE VS M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HADAR, LUA AKA ITZLER, LOUISE THE COURT FINDS FOR PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT HADAR, AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT M & C, INC. THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF HER COSTS OF SUIT IN THIS ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,082.00 FILED BY HADAR, LUA AKA ITZLER, LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $720.00 FILED BY M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HADAR, LUA AKA ITZLER, LOUISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HADAR, LUA AKA ITZLER, LOUISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT M & S INC. DBA PURPLE ONION DBA MACARONI EXPRESS $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $72.00, THE ABOVE-CAPTIONED MATTER CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL ON JANUARY 12, 2006. HAVING HEARD AND CONSIDERED THE TESTIMONY OF THE WITNESSES, AND REVIEWED THE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED, THE COURT ORDERS AS FOLLOWS: (SEE ATTACHMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
